defs: In a positive manner; absolutely; really; expressly; with certainty; indubitably; peremptorily; dogmatically; -- opposed to negatively.
quotes: Good and evil which is removed may be esteemed good or evil comparatively, and positively simply.
Give me some breath, some little pause, my lord, Before I positively speak herein.
I would ask . . . whether . . . the divine law does not positively require humility and meekness.
